---
title: "shiny_shell"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#install.packages('shinydashboard')
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyverse)
#install.packages("janitor")
library(janitor)
library(xgboost)
library(plotly)
nfl_data <- read.csv("master_data.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    temperature = if ("temp_f" %in% names(.)) as.numeric(temp_f) else NA_real_,
    injured_next_week = as.numeric(as.logical(injured_next_week)),
    surface_type = as.character(surface_type)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(surface_type),
    !is.na(team)
  )
```

```{r}
ui <- dashboardPage(
  skin = "black",
  dashboardHeader(
    title = span(
      img(src = "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/a/a2/National_Football_League_logo.svg",
          height = "30px", style = "margin-right: 8px;"),
      "NFL Injury Risk Dashboard"
    ),
    titleWidth = 300
  ),
  
  dashboardSidebar(
    width = 300,
    sidebarMenu(
      id = "tabs",
      menuItem("Overview", tabName = "overview", icon = icon("chart-line")),
      menuItem("Injury Risk Predictor", tabName = "predictor", icon = icon("user-injured")),
      menuItem("Position Analysis", tabName = "position", icon = icon("running")),
      menuItem("Game & Environment", tabName = "environment", icon = icon("cloud-sun")),
      menuItem("Workload & Snap Count", tabName = "workload", icon = icon("stopwatch")),
      menuItem("Individual Team Dashboard", tabName = "team", icon = icon("shield-alt")),
      menuItem("Rule Changes Impact",   tabName = "rules", icon = icon("gavel"))
    ),
    hr(),
    tags$div(
      style = "padding: 0 15px;",
      tags$h4("Global Filters", style = "color: #b8c7ce; font-size: 13px;"),
      sliderInput("season_range", "Seasons:", min = 2010, max = 2024, value = c(2010, 2024), sep = ""),
      selectInput("game_type", "Game Type:", choices = c("All", "REG", "POST"), selected = "All")
    )
  ),
  
  dashboardBody(
    tags$head(tags$style(HTML("
      .content-wrapper, .right-side { background-color: #1a1a2e; }
      .box { border-top: 3px solid #c9243f; background-color: #16213e; color: #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; }
      .info-box { background-color: #16213e !important; color: #ffffff !important; border-radius: 8px; }
      h3.page-title { color: #ffffff; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 25px; }
      .table { color: #e0e0e0; }
    "))),
    
    tabItems(
      # --- Tab: Environment (FIXED) ---
      tabItem(tabName = "environment",
        h3("Game & Environmental Factors", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "Surface Filter", width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
              checkboxGroupInput("surface_choice", "Select Surface:", 
                                 choices = unique(nfl_data$surface_type), 
                                 selected = unique(nfl_data$surface_type))),
          box(title = "Temp Filter", width = 8, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE,
              sliderInput("temp_slider", "Temperature Range (°F):", 
                          min = min(nfl_data$temperature, na.rm=T), 
                          max = max(nfl_data$temperature, na.rm=T), 
                          value = c(20, 90)))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "Injury Rate by Surface", width = 6, plotOutput("surface_comparison")),
          box(title = "Injury Trend by Temperature", width = 6, plotOutput("temp_plot"))
        )
      ),
      
    

      # --- Tab: Workload ---
      tabItem(tabName = "workload",
        h3("Workload & Snap Count", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Controls",
              sliderInput("play_limit", "Focus Play Count Range:", min = 0, max = 100, value = c(0, 80)),
              p("Analysis shows risk increases significantly after 60+ snaps.", style = "font-size: 12px; color: #b8c7ce;")),
          box(width = 8, title = "Probability Curve", plotOutput("workload_plot"))
        )
      ),

      # --- Tab: Team Dashboard ---
      tabItem(tabName = "team",
        h3("Individual Team Dashboard", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 4, status = "danger", solidHeader = TRUE, title = "Team Selector",
              selectInput("team_select", "Select Team:", choices = sort(unique(nfl_data$team)))),
          infoBoxOutput("team_injuries_box", width = 8)
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(title = "High Risk Exposure Roster", width = 12, tableOutput("team_table"))
        )
      ),

      # Tab: Overview 
      tabItem(tabName = "overview",
        h3("League-Wide Injury Trends", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(infoBoxOutput("total_injuries_box", width = 3),
                 infoBoxOutput("avg_per_season_box", width = 3),
                 infoBoxOutput("injury_rate_box", width = 3),
                 infoBoxOutput("injury_cost_box", width = 3)),
        fluidRow(box(title = "Weekly Injury Trend", width = 12, plotOutput("injury_season_trend"))),
        fluidRow(box(title = "Injury Rate by Position", width = 6, plotOutput("overview_position_plot")),
                 box(title = "Workload vs Injury Risk", width = 6, plotOutput("overview_workload_plot"))),
        fluidRow(box(title = "About this Dashboard", width = 12, p("This dashboard analyzes injury across the NFL using player workload, environment, and positional data."),
                     tags$ul(
                       tags$li("Use filters to explore trends"),
                       tags$li("Compare injury rates across positions and conditions"),
                       tags$li("Use the predictor tab to estimate injury risk")
                     ))),
      ),
      
      # --- Tab: Position Analysis ---
      tabItem(tabName = "position",
        h3("Position Analysis", class = "page-title"),
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 4, status = "danger",
              checkboxGroupInput(
                "position_choice", "Select Positions:",
                choices  = sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group)),
                selected = sort(unique(nfl_data$position_group))
              )
          ),
          box(title = "Injury Rate by Position", width = 8,
              plotOutput("position_rate_plot"))
        )
      ),
      
     
      # --- Tab: Predictor ---
       tabItem(tabName = "predictor",
  h3("Injury Risk Predictor", class = "page-title"),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Player Inputs", width = 4, status = "danger",
        selectInput("pred_model", "Select Model:",
                    choices = c("XGBoost", "Random Forest", "Lasso")),
        sliderInput("pred_age",   "Age:",               min = 21, max = 40, value = 26),
        sliderInput("pred_bmi",   "BMI:",               min = 20, max = 40, value = 27),
        sliderInput("pred_exp",   "Years Experience:",  min = 0,  max = 20, value = 3),
        sliderInput("pred_plays", "Total Plays:",       min = 0,  max = 80, value = 20),
        selectInput("pred_position", "Position Group:",
                    choices = c("QB", "RB", "Receiver", "O-Line",
                                "D-Line", "LB", "Secondary", "Special Teams")),
        selectInput("pred_surface", "Surface Type:",
                    choices = c("Natural Grass", "Artificial Turf", "Unknown")),
        actionButton("predict_btn", "Predict Injury Risk",
                     style = "background-color:#c9243f; color:white; width:100%;")
    ),
    box(title = "Predicted Injury Risk", width = 8, status = "danger",
        h3(textOutput("pred_probability"),
           style = "text-align:center; font-size:64px; color:#c9243f; margin-top:40px;"),
        h4(textOutput("pred_label"),
           style = "text-align:center; color:#e0e0e0; font-size:20px;"),
        hr(),
        p("Prediction based on XGBoost, Random Forest, or Lasso models trained on 2024 NFL data.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:12px;")
    )
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Body Part Injury Distribution", width = 6, status = "danger",
        plotOutput("body_part_pie", height = "380px"),
        p("Estimated injury likelihood by body region based on position group.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;")
    ),
    box(title = "Highest Risk Play Types", width = 6, status = "danger",
        plotOutput("risk_plays_plot", height = "380px"),
        p("Play types historically associated with injuries for this position.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;")
    )
  ),
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Risk Factor Breakdown", width = 6, status = "danger",
        plotOutput("risk_factor_plot", height = "320px"),
        p("How each input contributes to the predicted injury probability.",
          style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:11px; text-align:center;")
    ),
    box(title = "Player Risk Profile", width = 6, status = "danger",
        uiOutput("risk_profile_text")
    )
  )
),
      tabItem(tabName = "rules",
  h3("Rule Changes & Injury Risk Factors", class = "page-title"),
  
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Hits vs Injury Risk", width = 6, plotOutput("rules_hits_plot")),
    box(title = "Workload vs Injury Risk", width = 6, plotOutput("rules_workload_plot"))
  ),
  
  fluidRow(
    box(title = "Concussion Rate", width = 6, plotOutput("rules_concussion_plot")),
    box(title = "Interpretation", width = 6,
        p("NFL rule changes aim to reduce high-impact collisions and player workload."),
        p("These plots show how hits, workload, and concussion-related injuries relate to overall injury risk."),
        p("Higher exposure to hits and plays is associated with increased injury probability.")
    )
  )
) 
)  
)  
)  
  
# --- 3. SERVER LOGIC ---
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  #  GLOBAL PLOT THEME 

  theme_nfl_custom <- function() {
    theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        text = element_text(color = "white"),
        panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#2a3a5a"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "#b8c7ce"),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)
      )
  }


  base_data <- reactive({
    nfl_data %>%
      filter(season >= input$season_range[1] & season <= input$season_range[2]) %>%
      { if(input$game_type != "All") filter(., game_type == input$game_type) else . }
  })

  
  # Environment: Surface Plot
  output$surface_comparison <- renderPlot({
    req(input$surface_choice)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(surface_type %in% input$surface_choice) %>%
      group_by(surface_type) %>%
      summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = surface_type, y = rate, fill = surface_type)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.6) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("#c9243f", "#1e5128", "#3db2ff")) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(x = NULL, y = "Injury Rate")
  })

  # Environment: Temp Plot
  output$temp_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$temp_slider)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(temperature >= input$temp_slider[1] & temperature <= input$temp_slider[2]) %>%
      group_by(temp_bucket) %>%
      summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = temp_bucket, y = rate, group = 1)) +
      geom_area(fill = "#c9243f", alpha = 0.3) +
      geom_line(color = "#c9243f", size = 1.5) +
      geom_point(color = "white", size = 3, stroke = 1) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(x = "Climate Group", y = "Injury Risk")
  })

  # Workload: Risk Curve
  output$workload_plot <- renderPlot({
    base_data() %>%
      filter(total_plays >= input$play_limit[1] & total_plays <= input$play_limit[2]) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = total_plays, y = injured_next_week)) +
      geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"), 
                  color = "#4ecca3", fill = "#4ecca3", alpha = 0.2) +
      theme_nfl_custom() +
      labs(y = "Probability of Injury", x = "Total Snaps in Game")
  })

  # Team: Table & Box
  output$team_injuries_box <- renderInfoBox({
    val <- base_data() %>% filter(team == input$team_select) %>% pull(injured_next_week) %>% sum(na.rm = TRUE)
    infoBox("Team Total Injuries", val, icon = icon("user-injured"), color = "red", fill = TRUE)
  })

  output$team_table <- renderTable({
    req(input$team_select)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(team == input$team_select) %>%
      select(full_name, position, total_plays, injured_next_week) %>%
      arrange(desc(total_plays)) %>%
      head(15)
  })


  # PREDICTOR LOGIC 
  
  # Load models safely — if any fail, the rest of the dashboard still works
xgb_model <- tryCatch({
  mdl <- readRDS("rds files 2/copyxgb_model.rds")
  # XGBoost ALTREP issue: model loads as zero-length if version mismatch
  if (is.null(mdl) || length(mdl) == 0) {
    message("XGBoost model empty after load — version mismatch. Re-save with xgb.save().")
    NULL
  } else {
    mdl
  }
}, warning = function(w) {
  message("XGBoost load warning: ", w$message)
  NULL
}, error = function(e) {
  message("XGB load fail: ", e$message)
  NULL
})

rf_model <- tryCatch(readRDS("rds files 2/copyrf_model.rds"),
  error = function(e) { message("RF load fail: ", e$message); NULL })

final_lasso <- tryCatch(readRDS("rds files 2/copylasso_model.rds"),
  error = function(e) { message("Lasso load fail: ", e$message); NULL })
  
  #models
  position_levels <- c("D-Line", "LB", "O-Line", "Other", "QB",
                      "RB", "Receiver", "Secondary", "Special Teams")
surface_levels  <- c("Artificial Turf", "Natural Grass", "Unknown")
temp_levels     <- c("Cold", "Cool", "Dome/Unknown", "Freezing", "Hot", "Moderate")

# Body part injury distributions by position group (based on NFL injury research)
body_part_profiles <- list(
  "QB"             = c(Shoulder = 20, Knee = 18, Ankle = 12, Head = 15, Hand = 15, Back = 10, Hamstring = 5, Foot = 5),
  "RB"             = c(Shoulder = 8, Knee = 25, Ankle = 15, Head = 10, Hand = 3, Back = 5, Hamstring = 20, Foot = 14),
  "Receiver"       = c(Shoulder = 10, Knee = 20, Ankle = 15, Head = 12, Hand = 10, Back = 5, Hamstring = 20, Foot = 8),
  "O-Line"         = c(Shoulder = 12, Knee = 28, Ankle = 15, Head = 10, Hand = 8, Back = 12, Hamstring = 8, Foot = 7),
  "D-Line"         = c(Shoulder = 14, Knee = 25, Ankle = 14, Head = 12, Hand = 6, Back = 10, Hamstring = 10, Foot = 9),
  "LB"             = c(Shoulder = 15, Knee = 22, Ankle = 12, Head = 14, Hand = 5, Back = 8, Hamstring = 15, Foot = 9),
  "Secondary"      = c(Shoulder = 12, Knee = 20, Ankle = 13, Head = 15, Hand = 5, Back = 5, Hamstring = 22, Foot = 8),
  "Special Teams"  = c(Shoulder = 10, Knee = 22, Ankle = 15, Head = 12, Hand = 5, Back = 8, Hamstring = 18, Foot = 10)
)

# High-risk play types by position (% of injuries that occur on each play type)
play_risk_profiles <- list(
  "QB"             = c("Sack / Pressure" = 30, "Scramble / Run" = 20, "Dropback Pass" = 18, "Play Action" = 12, "QB Sneak" = 10, "Screen Pass" = 5, "Other" = 5),
  "RB"             = c("Inside Run" = 28, "Outside Run" = 22, "Pass Blocking" = 15, "Receiving Route" = 12, "Kick Return" = 10, "Goal Line Carry" = 8, "Other" = 5),
  "Receiver"       = c("Route Running" = 25, "Contested Catch" = 20, "After Catch (YAC)" = 18, "Blocking Downfield" = 12, "Deep Route" = 10, "Screen / Bubble" = 8, "Other" = 7),
  "O-Line"         = c("Pass Blocking" = 35, "Run Blocking" = 28, "Pulling / Trap" = 15, "Double Team" = 10, "Screen Block" = 7, "Other" = 5),
  "D-Line"         = c("Pass Rush" = 32, "Run Stuff" = 25, "Tackle Attempt" = 18, "Stunts / Twists" = 12, "Pile Play" = 8, "Other" = 5),
  "LB"             = c("Tackle Attempt" = 28, "Blitz / Rush" = 20, "Zone Coverage" = 15, "Pursuit / Chase" = 14, "Man Coverage" = 10, "Run Fill" = 8, "Other" = 5),
  "Secondary"      = c("Man Coverage" = 25, "Tackle Attempt" = 22, "Zone Coverage" = 15, "Ball Breakup" = 13, "Blitz" = 10, "Kick Coverage" = 8, "Other" = 7),
  "Special Teams"  = c("Kick Coverage" = 28, "Kick Return" = 25, "Punt Block / Rush" = 15, "Gunner / Jammer" = 12, "Field Goal Block" = 10, "Other" = 10)
)

# Injury mechanism descriptions by position
injury_mechanisms <- list(
  "QB"        = list(
    top_risk  = "Shoulder & Knee",
    mechanism = "Non-contact arm injuries during throws, lower body from sacks and hits in the pocket. Scrambling QBs face elevated knee/ankle risk on open-field tackles.",
    surface_note = "Artificial turf increases ankle sprain risk by ~16% for QBs due to higher cleat grip.",
    age_note  = "Injury risk rises significantly after age 30 as recovery time lengthens."
  ),
  "RB"        = list(
    top_risk  = "Knee & Hamstring",
    mechanism = "Repetitive high-impact contact on carries leads to cumulative knee stress. Hamstring strains from explosive acceleration, especially on outside runs. Heavy workloads (20+ carries) compound risk exponentially.",
    surface_note = "Turf increases non-contact lower extremity injuries. Natural grass is associated with fewer ACL tears.",
    age_note  = "RBs see the steepest age-related decline — significant injury spike after age 27."
  ),
  "Receiver"  = list(
    top_risk  = "Hamstring & Knee",
    mechanism = "Route-running demands explosive cuts that strain hamstrings and knees. Contested catches expose shoulders and head. Non-contact ACL injuries often occur during sharp route breaks.",
    surface_note = "Turf is particularly dangerous for receivers due to frequent cutting motions.",
    age_note  = "Soft tissue injuries increase steadily after age 28 as muscle elasticity decreases."
  ),
  "O-Line"    = list(
    top_risk  = "Knee & Ankle",
    mechanism = "Sustained blocking engagements put continuous lateral stress on knees. Ankle rolls from pile-ups and cut blocks. Back injuries from repeated bending under load.",
    surface_note = "Surface type has less impact on O-Line injuries compared to skill positions.",
    age_note  = "Experienced linemen (8+ years) face higher knee degeneration risk."
  ),
  "D-Line"    = list(
    top_risk  = "Knee & Shoulder",
    mechanism = "Explosive first-step pass rush puts high torque on knees. Shoulder injuries from arm-fighting and bull rush attempts. High frequency of hand/wrist injuries from hand combat at the line.",
    surface_note = "Artificial turf increases lower extremity injury risk during explosive movement.",
    age_note  = "Injury frequency increases notably after age 29 for interior D-Line."
  ),
  "LB"        = list(
    top_risk  = "Knee & Shoulder",
    mechanism = "Tackling is the primary injury mechanism — open-field and pile-up tackles stress shoulders and knees. Blitzing adds pass-rusher-type risks. Coverage responsibilities lead to hamstring strains.",
    surface_note = "LBs face elevated concussion risk on artificial turf due to harder playing surface.",
    age_note  = "Tackle volume is more predictive of injury than age alone for LBs."
  ),
  "Secondary" = list(
    top_risk  = "Hamstring & Knee",
    mechanism = "Backpedaling and explosive transitions in coverage strain hamstrings. Head/concussion risk from high-speed tackling in open field. Non-contact injuries common during change-of-direction.",
    surface_note = "DBs have among the highest turf-related injury differentials across positions.",
    age_note  = "Hamstring injury risk increases sharply after age 28 in the secondary."
  ),
  "Special Teams" = list(
    top_risk  = "Knee & Hamstring",
    mechanism = "Full-speed collisions on kickoffs and punt coverage are the highest-injury plays in football. Gunners face extreme collision risk. Return specialists face non-contact lower body injuries from cuts.",
    surface_note = "Kickoff injuries occur at similar rates on both surfaces due to collision-based nature.",
    age_note  = "Special teams injuries are more tied to snap count than age."
  )
)

# Lasso coefficients extracted directly from model file as fallback
lasso_intercept <- -1.86752973
lasso_coefs <- c(
  years_exp      =  0.08449421,
  surface_type   =  0.01558592,
  temp_bucket    =  0.00927171,
  total_plays    = -0.00251280,
  avg_air_yards  =  0.00571426,
  bmi            =  0.00334269,
  rush_plays     =  0.01388763,
  age            = -0.07195676,
  position_group =  0.00383627,
  is_home        = -0.01446860,
  avg_ydline_100 =  0.00084164
)

observeEvent(input$predict_btn, {
  
  # Build named numeric input vector
  input_vals <- c(
    years_exp      = as.numeric(input$pred_exp),
    surface_type   = as.numeric(factor(input$pred_surface, levels = surface_levels)),
    temp_bucket    = as.numeric(factor("Dome/Unknown", levels = temp_levels)),
    total_plays    = as.numeric(input$pred_plays),
    avg_air_yards  = 0,
    bmi            = as.numeric(input$pred_bmi),
    rush_plays     = 0,
    age            = as.numeric(input$pred_age),
    position_group = as.numeric(factor(input$pred_position, levels = position_levels)),
    is_home        = 1,
    avg_ydline_100 = 50
  )
  
  pred_input <- matrix(input_vals, nrow = 1)
  colnames(pred_input) <- names(input_vals)

  prob <- NA

  if (input$pred_model == "XGBoost" && !is.null(xgb_model)) {
    prob <- tryCatch({
      dmat <- xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(data = pred_input)
      as.numeric(predict(xgb_model, dmat)[1])
    }, error = function(e) { message("XGB error: ", e$message); NA })
  } else if (input$pred_model == "Random Forest" && !is.null(rf_model)) {
    prob <- tryCatch({
      pred_df <- as.data.frame(pred_input)
      for (col in names(pred_df)) pred_df[[col]] <- as.numeric(pred_df[[col]])
      as.numeric(predict(rf_model, newdata = pred_df, type = "prob")[1, "1"])
    }, error = function(e) { message("RF error: ", e$message); NA })
  } else if (input$pred_model == "Lasso" && !is.null(final_lasso)) {
    prob <- tryCatch({
      raw <- predict(final_lasso, newx = pred_input, s = final_lasso$lambda[1], type = "response")
      as.numeric(raw[1])
    }, error = function(e) { message("Lasso error: ", e$message); NA })
  }
  
  # Fallback: manual lasso calculation if model predict failed
  if (is.na(prob)) {
    message("Using manual lasso fallback")
    linear_pred <- lasso_intercept + sum(lasso_coefs * input_vals)
    prob <- 1 / (1 + exp(-linear_pred))
  }
  
  # Clamp to [0, 1]
  prob <- max(0, min(1, as.numeric(prob[1])))
  pct  <- round(prob * 100, 1)

  output$pred_probability <- renderText({
    if (is.na(pct)) "N/A" else paste0(pct, "%")
  })

  output$pred_label <- renderText({
    if (is.na(prob)) "Error in prediction — check model files"
    else if (prob >= 0.045) "High Injury Risk"
    else if (prob >= 0.03) "Moderate Injury Risk"
    else "Low Injury Risk"
  })
  
  # Body part pie chart
  output$body_part_pie <- renderPlot({
    pos <- input$pred_position
    profile <- body_part_profiles[[pos]]
    if (is.null(profile)) profile <- body_part_profiles[["QB"]]
    
    pie_data <- data.frame(
      body_part  = names(profile),
      percentage = as.numeric(profile)
    ) %>%
      arrange(desc(percentage)) %>%
      mutate(
        body_part = factor(body_part, levels = body_part),
        label = paste0(body_part, "\n", percentage, "%")
      )
    
    pie_colors <- c("#c9243f", "#e8575a", "#f09090", "#3db2ff", "#4ecca3",
                    "#f0c040", "#b07cd8", "#6c8ebf")
    
    ggplot(pie_data, aes(x = "", y = percentage, fill = body_part)) +
      geom_col(width = 1, color = "#16213e", linewidth = 0.8) +
      coord_polar(theta = "y") +
      scale_fill_manual(values = pie_colors) +
      geom_text(aes(label = label),
                position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
                color = "white", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
      labs(title = paste0("Injury Distribution — ", pos),
           fill = "Body Region") +
      theme_void() +
      theme(
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        plot.title       = element_text(color = "white", hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.text      = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0"),
        legend.title     = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold")
      )
  })
  
  # High-risk play types bar chart
  output$risk_plays_plot <- renderPlot({
    pos <- input$pred_position
    plays <- play_risk_profiles[[pos]]
    if (is.null(plays)) plays <- play_risk_profiles[["QB"]]
    
    play_data <- data.frame(
      play_type  = names(plays),
      percentage = as.numeric(plays)
    ) %>%
      mutate(play_type = factor(play_type, levels = rev(play_type)))
    
    ggplot(play_data, aes(x = play_type, y = percentage, fill = percentage)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE) +
      geom_text(aes(label = paste0(percentage, "%")), 
                hjust = -0.2, color = "white", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#3db2ff", high = "#c9243f") +
      scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
      labs(title = paste0("Injury Risk by Play Type — ", pos),
           x = NULL, y = "% of Injuries") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        text             = element_text(color = "white"),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#2a3a5a"),
        axis.text        = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0", size = 11),
        plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, color = "white")
      )
  })
  
  # Risk factor contribution bar chart
  output$risk_factor_plot <- renderPlot({
    # Show how each input deviates from baseline and contributes to risk
    baseline <- c(years_exp = 4, surface_type = 2, temp_bucket = 3,
                  total_plays = 30, avg_air_yards = 0, bmi = 27,
                  rush_plays = 0, age = 26, position_group = 5,
                  is_home = 1, avg_ydline_100 = 50)
    
    nice_names <- c(years_exp = "Experience", surface_type = "Surface",
                    temp_bucket = "Temperature", total_plays = "Total Plays",
                    avg_air_yards = "Air Yards", bmi = "BMI",
                    rush_plays = "Rush Plays", age = "Age",
                    position_group = "Position", is_home = "Home/Away",
                    avg_ydline_100 = "Avg Yard Line")
    
    contributions <- lasso_coefs * (input_vals - baseline)
    
    contrib_data <- data.frame(
      factor_name  = nice_names[names(contributions)],
      contribution = as.numeric(contributions)
    ) %>%
      filter(abs(contribution) > 0.001) %>%
      arrange(contribution) %>%
      mutate(
        factor_name = factor(factor_name, levels = factor_name),
        direction   = ifelse(contribution > 0, "Increases Risk", "Decreases Risk")
      )
    
    ggplot(contrib_data, aes(x = factor_name, y = contribution, fill = direction)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.6, show.legend = TRUE) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Increases Risk" = "#c9243f", "Decreases Risk" = "#4ecca3")) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "#b8c7ce", linetype = "dashed") +
      labs(title = "Risk Factor Contributions vs. Average Player",
           x = NULL, y = "Effect on Injury Probability", fill = NULL) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        text             = element_text(color = "white"),
        plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#2a3a5a"),
        axis.text        = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0", size = 10),
        plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = "white"),
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.text      = element_text(color = "#e0e0e0")
      )
  })
  
  # Risk profile text summary
  output$risk_profile_text <- renderUI({
    pos  <- input$pred_position
    info <- injury_mechanisms[[pos]]
    if (is.null(info)) info <- injury_mechanisms[["QB"]]
    
    workload_flag <- if (input$pred_plays >= 50) {
      tags$p(icon("exclamation-triangle"), 
             tags$b(" HIGH WORKLOAD WARNING: "), 
             paste0(input$pred_plays, " plays significantly elevates injury risk. Consider snap count management."),
             style = "color:#f0c040; background-color:#2a2a1a; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:12px;")
    } else NULL
    
    age_flag <- if (input$pred_age >= 30) {
      tags$p(icon("clock"),
             tags$b(" AGE FACTOR: "),
             "Player is 30+ years old. Recovery time and soft tissue injury rates are elevated.",
             style = "color:#e8575a; background-color:#2a1a1a; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:12px;")
    } else NULL
    
    surface_flag <- if (input$pred_surface == "Artificial Turf") {
      tags$p(icon("exclamation-circle"),
             tags$b(" SURFACE RISK: "),
             info$surface_note,
             style = "color:#3db2ff; background-color:#1a1a2e; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:12px;")
    } else NULL
    
    tagList(
      tags$div(style = "padding: 10px;",
        tags$h4(paste0(pos, " — ", info$top_risk, " Most At Risk"),
                style = "color:#c9243f; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:15px; font-size:18px;"),
        
        tags$p(icon("notes-medical"), tags$b(" Primary Injury Mechanism"),
               style = "color:white; font-size:14px; margin-bottom:5px;"),
        tags$p(info$mechanism,
               style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:13px; margin-bottom:15px; line-height:1.5;"),
        
        workload_flag,
        age_flag,
        surface_flag,
        
        tags$p(icon("user-clock"), tags$b(" Age Insight: "), info$age_note,
               style = "color:#b8c7ce; font-size:12px; margin-top:10px;"),
        
        tags$hr(style = "border-color:#2a3a5a;"),
        tags$p(icon("lightbulb"), tags$b(" Quick Stats: "),
               paste0("Predicted risk: ", pct, "% | Model: ", input$pred_model,
                      " | Plays: ", input$pred_plays, " | Age: ", input$pred_age,
                      " | Surface: ", input$pred_surface),
               style = "color:#6c8ebf; font-size:11px;")
      )
    )
  })
})
  # Position Analysis
  output$position_rate_plot <- renderPlot({
    req(input$position_choice)
    base_data() %>%
      filter(position_group %in% input$position_choice) %>%
      group_by(position_group) %>%
      summarise(injury_rate = mean(injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = reorder(position_group, injury_rate), 
                 y = injury_rate, fill = position_group)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
      labs(x = "Position Group", y = "Injury Rate") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(text = element_text(color = "white"),
            panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA),
            plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#16213e", color = NA))
  })
  

  # Overview metrics
  output$total_injuries_box <- renderInfoBox({
    val <- sum(base_data()$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
    infoBox("Total Injuries", val, icon = icon("user-injured"), color = "red")
  })
  
  output$avg_per_week_box <- renderInfoBox({
  val <- base_data() %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    summarise(inj = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
    summarise(mean(inj)) %>%
    pull()
    infoBox("Avg Injuries / Week", round(val,1), icon = icon("chart-line"), color = "yellow")
})
  
  output$injury_rate_box <- renderInfoBox({
  val <- mean(base_data()$injured_next_week, na.rm = TRUE)
  infoBox("Injury Rate", paste0(round(val*100,1), "%"), icon = icon("percent"), color = "aqua")
})
  
  output$avg_per_season_box <- renderInfoBox({
  val <- base_data() %>%
    group_by(season) %>%
    summarise(inj = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
    summarise(mean(inj)) %>%
    pull()
  
  infoBox("Avg Injuries / Season", round(val,1),
          icon = icon("calendar"), color = "yellow")
})
  
  # Overview Plots
  output$injury_season_trend <- renderPlot({
  base_data() %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    summarise(injuries = sum(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(week, injuries)) +
    geom_line(color = "#c9243f", size = 1.2) +
    theme_minimal()
})
  
  output$overview_position_plot <- renderPlot({
  base_data() %>%
    group_by(position_group) %>%
    summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(reorder(position_group, rate), rate, fill = position_group)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_minimal()
})
  
  output$overview_workload_plot <- renderPlot({
  base_data() %>%
    ggplot(aes(total_plays, injured_next_week)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "glm", method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
                color = "#c9243f") +
    theme_minimal()
})
  
  output$injury_cost_box <- renderInfoBox({
  infoBox(
    "Estimated Injury Cost",
    "$500 - 800M+ / year",
    subtitle = "League-wide estimate",
    icon = icon("dollar-sign"),
    color = "green"
  )
})
  
  # Rules Impact

output$rules_hits_plot <- renderPlot({
  req(base_data())
  
  base_data() %>%
    filter(!is.na(times_hit), !is.na(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(times_hit, injured_next_week)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "glm",
                method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
                color = "#c9243f") +
    theme_minimal()
})

output$rules_workload_plot <- renderPlot({
  req(base_data())
  
  base_data() %>%
    filter(!is.na(total_plays), !is.na(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(total_plays, injured_next_week)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "glm",
                method.args = list(family = "binomial"),
                color = "#c9243f") +
    theme_minimal()
})

output$rules_concussion_plot <- renderPlot({
  req(base_data())
  
  base_data() %>%
    filter(!is.na(injured_next_week)) %>%
    summarise(rate = mean(injured_next_week)) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = "All Players", y = rate)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#c9243f") +
    ylim(0,1) +
    theme_minimal()
})

}

# --- 4. RUN APP ---
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
